title: project coordinator/ manager
description:
Project Manager (Renovation Projects) – Full-Time

Location

Singapore

About the Role

We are looking for an experienced and hands-on Project Manager to oversee renovation projects from planning to completion.

This role is critical to ensuring projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to quality standards, while coordinating clients, designers, site teams, and subcontractors. You will be the key person responsible for execution on the ground and overall project success.

If you enjoy problem-solving, managing people, and seeing projects completed properly, this role offers strong ownership and long-term growth.

Key Responsibilities

Project Planning & Execution

  • Manage renovation projects from handover to completion

  • Develop project schedules, work plans, and timelines

  • Coordinate site activities, manpower, and subcontractors

  • Ensure works are carried out according to drawings, specifications, and scope

Site & Quality Management

  • Conduct regular site inspections to monitor progress and workmanship

  • Identify and resolve site issues promptly

  • Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and industry standards

  • Manage rectifications and handover quality checks

Client & Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the main point of contact for clients during project execution

  • Provide regular progress updates and manage expectations

  • Handle site coordination with designers, suppliers, and vendors

  • Resolve client concerns professionally and constructively

Cost, Documentation & Claims

  • Track project costs, variations, and claims

  • Verify subcontractor work progress and payments

  • Ensure proper documentation of approvals, variations, and handovers

  • Support management with reporting and project updates

Team & Coordination

  • Lead and guide site supervisors and coordinators

  • Coordinate closely with office, design, and operations teams

  • Enforce company processes and best practices on site

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Construction Management, Engineering, or related field

  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience managing renovation or construction projects

  • Strong knowledge of renovation works, sequencing, and site coordination

  • Familiar with local renovation practices and Singapore regulations

  • Good communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills

  • Able to manage multiple projects and deadlines

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office; project management tools are an advantage

What You Can Achieve With Us

By succeeding in this role, you will:

  • Take ownership of end-to-end renovation projects

  • Build a strong track record of successful project delivery

  • Develop leadership skills managing teams and stakeholders

  • Progress into roles such as:

    • Senior Project Manager, or

    • Operations / Project Lead

  • Be part of a company that values accountability, execution, and quality

Why Join Us

  • Stable full-time role in a growing renovation company

  • Strong project ownership and decision-making authority

  • Supportive management and clear processes

  • Career progression and leadership opportunities

  • Salary commensurate with experience

  • Leave and benefits according to MOM guidelines

Working Hours

  • Monday to Friday, office hours

  • Site-based work with flexibility depending on project needs

postedCompany.description:
About the Contractor Kaki

The Contractor Kaki Group is an integrated practice spanning design, carpentry, and construction, delivering projects with clarity and accountability from concept to completion.

Led by Kiren Pak, whose background in Product Design, Interior & Landscape Design, and Facility Management bridges creativity with technical rigour, the group is built on a deep understanding of materials, buildability, and execution.

The group comprises three complementary entities:

  • Contractor Kaki (Direct SG Contractor Pte Ltd) — a BCA-registered contractor focused on engineering discipline, quality workmanship, and robust technical processes

  • Interior Kaki — a design-led interior practice with in-house carpentry and showroom, creating spaces that reflect the homeowner’s lifestyle and identity

  • Builder Kaki — a BCA Class 2 licensed builder, strengthening the group’s capability in larger-scale and complex building works

By integrating design, carpentry, and construction under one umbrella, the Contractor Kaki Group ensures design intent is respected, execution is disciplined, and quality is consistent across every project.

We build with purpose — combining design integrity, technical excellence, and long-term performance.
The beauty of the design and the engineering that creates funtional yet athestic masterpiece for the end user. We also focus on our Quality Work and our Techincal Work Process to work towards good worksmanship.  We are always taking in feedback from Clients so that we can keep on improving our work process and our techincal skill. Whichever space we design we design for Human and not the space! We loves to work with creative mind or anyone whom is interested to learn regardless of race, age or even sexes. At Contractor Kaki- we loves to share our skills and knowledge to those whom want to build this trade as there main career. At here- you can learn and grow and master whatever you want. Come join us!
